title: Blue Nether Portal
description: Changes from the boring purple nether portal to the highly new blue portal
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/274a932e7b9c0dd9c765ac5a34bfcc4cdb0f0265.png)

it literally does what it says

THIS RESOURCE PACK CHANGES FROM THE BORING PURPLE PORTAL TO THE IMPROVED BLUE PORTAL (literally changes one single texture)

![from purple to blue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53cad6be0fba9dca328e176653201dfe7d199f18.png)

DOWNLOAD TODAY AT MODRINTH! please download it

![purple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7b4ebd1a3b5ea8921551e42a1b09ca18e1e8685.gif)![blue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/811b7aa6bb88c09aa05f1d0c99a33f2d550c2c84.gif)
